content.content: Popular social media star who is best recognized for the chess commentary videos she that she streams on her botezlive Twitch channel. Her videos have earned her over 1.3 million subscribers on the app. Her "I Played Chess Hustlers in Union Square Park" video on YouTube has received over 16 million views since July of 2021. She graduated fromStanford Universityin 2017. In addition to her popular Twitch stream, she has a BotezLive YouTube channel where she has posted chess videos as well as vlogs. She has been a chess content creator on the Team Envy esports team. Her sisterAndrea Botezoften appears on her YouTube channel. She faced off againstPenguinz0in a chess match in July 2020.
